scroll_found.title: Research the Lore Scarlet King scroll at a Research Pedestal

red_stone.title: Find a naturally-generated red stone or corrupted structure (crimson, netherrack-contaminated, or red-tinted ruin)

subtitle.text: The Eye-Holders didn't fail. The Scarlet King didn't win. Neither is true. Both are true.

description: CH.05 · LORE OF THE SCARLET KING
▸ This scroll is older than the others.
The ink is a different color.
No civilization claimed authorship.
Someone left it where civilizations go to die.
◈ THE SCARLET KING
└ Not a monster. A principle.
Something that exists between worlds
in the space where light doesn't reach.
└ Trigger: the Wither Storm (mod) — summoning
the wrong configuration of Wither calls something
that is not the Wither into the world
└ ▲ DO NOT summon the Wither Storm carelessly
└ Ch12 is the Scarlet King confrontation chapter
It requires specific preparation (Manifestor Trap)
◈ WHAT THE SCROLL SAYS
└ 'It was here before the first civilization.'
└ 'The Eye-Holders found it and tried to seal it.'
└ 'The Nine Eyes were not for the portal.'
└ 'They were for the prison.'
└ 'The prison is broken. You are the new lock.'
◈ SCROLL: Lore of the Scarlet King
└ Found in: red stone structures, corrupted ruins,
ominous chests, stronghold alcoves
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: Scarlet King narrative, Ch12 foreshadowing,
Wither Storm warning knowledge
▸ Read this before Ch12.
Not because it helps you fight.
Because it explains what you're walking into.
▶ Find The Lore of the Scarlet King scroll [check]
▶ Find a corrupted or red-tinted ruin structure [check]
◇ The Scarlet King is defeated in Ch12
via the Manifestor Trap mechanic.
Direct combat is not possible — and is not the point.
